positive: A stylized, central composition illustration of a whimsical nocturnal forest scene. Silhouette style with vibrant neon pop accents. Depict a cluster of bioluminescent mushrooms, delicate fairy lights woven through tree roots, and a graceful stylized owl perched on a branch. Use high contrast backlighting, deep indigo blues, rich emerald greens, and electric magenta accents. The overall aesthetic should be clean, modern, and graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Flat vector art quality with strong lines, perfect symmetry, and an enchanted, mysterious mood.
